thresholds.rationale: Smoke floor for setup, shuffle, deal, canonical summary, and replay hash snapshot until repeated CI-runner measurements calibrate a tighter gate.
Smoke floor for pass-phase legal action generation across a 13-card private hand.
Smoke floor for validating and applying one pass selection through the command boundary.
Smoke floor for fourth pass confirmation plus atomic exchange and private/public effects.
Smoke floor for play legal-action generation from a maximum 13-card owner hand.
Smoke floor for constrained follow-suit legal-action generation.
Smoke floor for command validation plus applying one legal play.
Smoke floor for applying the fourth card of a trick and resolving the winner.
Smoke floor for non-moon hand scoring over a full 52-card captured-trick fixture.
Smoke floor for moon scoring over a full 52-card captured-trick fixture.
Smoke floor for match-threshold and unique-low outcome construction.
Smoke floor for observer-safe public projection without private hands.
Smoke floor for all four seat-private projections over the same playing fixture.
Smoke floor for public and seat-private effect filtering after pass exchange.
Smoke floor for driving a full hand through legal commands while recording replay hash snapshots.
Smoke floor for viewer-scoped public export/import; internal hands and seed data remain out of the export.
Smoke floor for viewer-scoped seat-private export/import with only the authorized seat view.
Smoke floor for Level 0 random legal action selection through legal action APIs.
Smoke floor for Level 1 bounded policy action selection through legal action APIs.
Smoke floor for one complete seeded 13-trick hand driven through legal pass/play actions.
Provisional Gate 16 native floor from the spec target; recalibrate only from repeated CI-runner evidence without removing visibility filtering, outcome detail, or legal-action validation.
